author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for decomposing tui::app::App from a 22-field God Object into four cohesive structs (ApiClient, SessionState, UiState, Services) with App as a thin coordinator. Not addressable in a cleanup pass: every TUI handler currently reads/writes App fields directly, the refactor would touch handle_key, handle_slash_command (660+ lines, #259), every API event handler, and the entire render path. This is the prerequisite for every other TUI refactor (#259, #270, #364) and must be owner-driven with a migration plan. Related TUI refactors (#259, #270, #364) tracked separately for granular landing once the App decomposition lands.
